title: Karate
description: Supervised karate classes led by qualified instructors, building physical agility, discipline, confidence, and self-defense awareness from an early age.

title: Yoga & Wellness
description: Daily morning yoga and mindfulness sessions to improve concentration, breathing, posture, emotional balance, and overall wellbeing in young learners.

title: Sporty Beans
description: A fun, structured multi-sport activity programme designed to introduce children to teamwork, coordination, and sportsmanship through games and drills.

title: Edu Sports
description: Educational sports sessions that blend physical activity with learning objectives — nurturing motor skills, focus, and healthy competition.

title: STEAM Training
description: Hands-on Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math activities that spark curiosity, problem-solving, and creative thinking from the very first years.

title: Robotics (Lego Building)
description: Age-appropriate robotics sessions using Lego building kits, introducing children to engineering concepts, logic, and collaborative creation in a playful environment.

title: Braindemics — Visual Learning
description: Visual and interactive class sessions that make complex concepts easy and memorable through storytelling, maps, diagrams, and engaging audiovisual tools.

title: Pre KG / LKG Play Area
description: A dedicated, safe, and age-appropriate play area exclusively for Pre KG and LKG students — designed to encourage exploration and imaginative play.

title: Full Play Area (Ages 5–8)
description: A full-fledged outdoor play area for primary school children aged 5 to 8 years, equipped with activity stations that develop gross motor skills and social confidence.
